user.title: Add House
user.description: Create a new house. Afterwards, you can add parties and cost items as subentries.

error.name_too_long: Name must be 50 characters or less.

user.title: Create Party
user.description: Fields marked with * are required. Name must be unique.

reconfigure.title: Edit Party
reconfigure.description: Update the master data for this party. The name still has to be unique.

error.name_too_long: Name must be 50 characters or less.
error.name_not_unique: A party with this name already exists.
error.invalid_flaeche: Area must be between 0 and 1000 m².
error.invalid_personen: Number of persons must be between 0 and 20.
error.invalid_date_range: "Occupied from" must be on or before "Occupied until".

user.title: Create Cost Item
user.description: Select assignment and mode first. The remaining fields will adapt accordingly.

data_description.zuordnung: House = distribute across parties. Party = belongs to a single party.
data_description.betragsmodus: Pauschal = fixed amount per cadence. Verbrauch = unit price × consumption.

details.title: Details
details.description: Depending on selection: target party, flat amount, consumption entity, or prepayment data.

data_description.grundgebuehr_eur_monat: Leave empty when there is no base fee.
data_description.monatlicher_abschlag_eur: What do you pay monthly as a prepayment?
data_description.abrechnungszeitraum_start: First day of the current reconciliation period.
data_description.verbrauchs_entity: Optional: meter sensor so the integration can derive actual cost from consumption.

verteilung.title: Distribution & period
verteilung.description: Pick the distribution key and optional active range.

data_description.verteilung: Which distribution is applied across parties.
data_description.aktiv_ab: Only relevant for seasonal costs (e.g. heating Oct–Apr).

subzaehler.title: Sub-meter per party
subzaehler.description: A consumption sensor must be referenced for every active party.

reconfigure.title: Edit Cost Item
reconfigure.description: Change assignment and mode. Follow-up steps will show the current values.

error.bezeichnung_too_long: Label must be 50 characters or less.
error.invalid_combination: This combination of assignment, mode and distribution key is invalid. See docs.
error.no_parteien: There are no parties in this house yet. Create at least one party first.
error.betrag_required: Amount is required and must be >= 0.
error.einheitspreis_required: Unit price is required and must be >= 0.
error.abschlag_required: Monthly prepayment is required and must be >= 0.
error.dauer_invalid: Duration must be between 1 and 36 months.
error.invalid_date_range: "Active from" must be on or before "Active until".
error.subzaehler_missing: A sub-meter must be referenced for every party.

abort.unknown_subentry: This cost item no longer exists.
abort.no_parteien: There are no parties in this house yet. Create at least one party first.

add_einmalig.name: Add One-Time Cost
add_einmalig.description: Adds a one-time cost item (e.g. repair, contractor invoice).

entry_id.name: House
entry_id.description: The hauskosten instance. Not required when only one house is configured.

bezeichnung.name: Label
bezeichnung.description: Short title for the cost item.

datum.name: Date
datum.description: Date on which the cost was incurred.

zuordnung.name: Assignment
zuordnung.description: House = distribute across parties. Party = belongs to one party.

zuordnung_partei_id.name: Target party
zuordnung_partei_id.description: Only with assignment 'Party': ID of the target party.

verteilung.name: Distribution key
verteilung.description: How the cost is split across parties.

notiz.name: Note
notiz.description: Optional note attached to the item.

mark_paid.name: Mark As Paid
mark_paid.description: Marks a cost item as paid.

entry_id.name: House
entry_id.description: The hauskosten instance. Not required when only one house is configured.

kostenposition_id.name: Cost item ID
kostenposition_id.description: The ID of the cost item or ad-hoc cost record.

bezahlt_am.name: Paid on
bezahlt_am.description: Date on which the payment was made.

jahresabrechnung_buchen.name: Book Annual Reconciliation
jahresabrechnung_buchen.description: Books the annual reconciliation for an Abschlag cost item: the difference between the final amount and the cumulative prepayments is recorded as a Nachzahlung, and the reconciliation period rolls forward automatically.

entry_id.name: House
entry_id.description: The hauskosten instance. Not required when only one house is configured.

kostenposition_id.name: Abschlag position
kostenposition_id.description: The ID of the Abschlag cost item (subentry_id).

final_betrag_eur.name: Final amount (EUR)
final_betrag_eur.description: The actual invoice amount from the utility.

abrechnungsdatum.name: Reconciliation date
abrechnungsdatum.description: Optional: date of the reconciliation. Defaults to today.
